title: Ferny Spreading Blossom: batch 26 curation dispositioned
body: Closed claim f53b9c56-47dc-4d1d-b2c6-a3db08bfd15c after processing legacy backlog batch 26 in place. Disposition: 5 items total, 2 duplicate and 3 owner-gated. Owner-gated register is now 64 items. Verification passed: targeted markdownlint, git diff check, collaboration-state check, and strict-hard fitness with 20 soft, 24 healthy, 7 ready-empty, 0 hard, 0 critical. Next safe step is batch 27: intent.notes as abandonment coordination and more-restrictive-Practice-rule-wins on reviewer conflict. No archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
